instruction: Finish the exit-hardening packet only after account data is exported, the access surface is reviewed, exit prep is complete, privacy settings are updated, two-factor is enabled, hardening is complete, and the security audit is done.
notes: Generated from BP_SECURITY_ZTRAIN_04_SURFACE_HARDEN_DUAL; exit-hardening workflows should carry through export, privacy review, 2FA hardening, and audit instead of terminating after a shallow surface action.
